name: sun_rises_direction
message: Known factual contradiction: the sun rises in the east.

name: sun_sets_direction
message: Known factual contradiction: the sun sets in the west.

name: earth_shape
message: Known factual contradiction: Earth is not flat.

name: moon_cheese
message: Known factual contradiction: the Moon is not made of cheese.

name: human_oxygen
message: Known factual contradiction: humans need oxygen to survive.

name: water_boiling_point_c
message: Known factual contradiction: water does not boil at 0°C under normal atmospheric pressure.

name: water_freezing_point_c
message: Known factual contradiction: water does not freeze at 100°C under normal atmospheric pressure.

name: sound_vs_light
message: Known factual contradiction: light travels faster than sound.

name: gravity_direction
message: Known factual contradiction: gravity pulls objects toward Earth, not upward.

name: kilometer_conversion
message: Known factual contradiction: 1 kilometer equals 1000 meters.

name: solar_system_center
message: Known factual contradiction: Earth is not the center of the solar system.

name: planet_count
message: Known factual contradiction: there are 8 planets in the solar system.

name: earth_moon_count
message: Known factual contradiction: Earth has 1 moon.

name: days_in_week
message: Known factual contradiction: there are 7 days in a week.

name: hours_in_day
message: Known factual contradiction: there are 24 hours in a day.

name: minutes_in_hour
message: Known factual contradiction: there are 60 minutes in an hour.
